forum-feed-mobile.description: Strict mobile forum feed profile with one-owner media discipline and single iframe allowance.

forum-feed-desktop.description: Desktop forum feed profile with limited warm concurrency and shared owner arbitration.

forum-thread.description: Thread-focused forum profile with tight content ownership and no ad concurrency.

landing-decorative.description: Decorative landing profile with degraded mobile autoplay and no content-grade runtime.

widget-heavy.description: Generic widget-heavy route profile with route-local widgets and strict cleanup.

editor-preview.description: Preview route profile with limited content runtime and no heavy widget bleed.

auth-light.description: Thin auth-bridge profile with no eager wallet runtime.

wallet-ready.description: Wallet-capable profile with explicit user-intent ownership.

exchange-heavy.description: Exchange route profile for TradingView/Binance/widget-heavy pages with route-local isolation.

about-decorative.description: Decorative about route profile with mobile degradation by default.

ads-preview.description: Ads preview route profile with preview-only media and intent-only auth or wallet bridges.

quest-cards.description: Quest cards profile with autoplay degradation and shared page budget.

qcast-mixed.description: Shared qcast and content profile with single mute source and overlap enforcement.
